mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT object_key AS object_key FROM rs_image WHERE object_key = #{objectKey} UNION ALL SELECT thumbnail_object_key AS object_key FROM rs_image WHERE thumbnail_object_key = #{objectKey} UNION ALL SELECT overview_object_key AS object_key FROM rs_image WHERE overview_object_key = #{objectKey} UNION ALL SELECT object_key AS object_key FROM rs_result_file WHERE object_key = #{objectKey} ) accessible_file
